text:
The Milsy Wetlands (, Numēre Shitsugen), also known as the "Swindler's Swamp" (, Sagi-shi no Negura), is the site of the second part of the First Phase in the 287th Hunter Exam. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 7 

Overview

The exam proctor Satotz, had examinees follow him through the treacherous biome until they reached the Visca Forest Preserve. The wetlands are home to numerous beasts, mysterious creatures, and deadly plants. A thick fog continually covers the area. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

The examinees to the 287th Hunter Exam are lead out of the underground tunnel and into the Milsy Wetlands. The exam proctor Satotz introduces the wetlands to the examinees and offers wise words of caution about the area as the place is also known as the "Swindler's Swamp". 

At that moment, a man with a Man-faced Ape appears and tries to cause a discord claiming he's the real exam proctor, however, examinee #44 Hisoka proves this to be false as he was just another Man-faced Ape. With the Man-faced Ape incident settled, Satotz leads the examinees through the treacherous biome where many fall victim to many of the indigenous fauna and flora. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 8 Taking advantage of the surrounding environment, Hisoka acts as an "exam proctor" of his own. He kills an abundance of examinees and corners, Leorio, Kurapika, and examinee #76 Cherry. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 9 The trio make a run for it but Leorio returns and retaliates against Hisoka, only to be saved by Gon and his fishing rod and then KO'ed by the killer with a single punch. In a fit of rage, Gon tries in earnest to land a blow against Hisoka but fails. Hisoka appraises Gon and informs him he passes, the killer then answers his walkie talkie and then carries Leorio to the end of the First Phase site, leaving Gon in despondence. 

On his way to the end of the phase site, Hisoka encounters and kills Cherry and hangs his dead body upside down to a tree. Gon manages to reconvene with Kurapika and with his nose follow the scent from Leorio's cologne. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 10
